lever: fused dense-i64 OUTER merge builder (build_single_key_dense_i64_outer_merge_output): bucket-order compact plan replaces per-bucket Vec<Vec<usize>> heap allocs + two output-length Vec<Option<usize>> + per-row Scalar key coalesce + per-column reindex walks; closed-form coalesced key lane (min_key+bucket repeat runs, all-valid); per-side Float64 promotion only when that side has missing rows; two shared word-fill validity masks; dual-type (i64/f64) row-chunked disjoint fills with muis1 tapes
scenario: perf_profile outer_join 100000, card 512, 50% key overlap (9.87M output rows), 3 iters

paired_hyperfine_outer_join.speedup: 17.77x +/- 0.97 (load ~28-37; alternating per-iter pairs agree: 767-1106 -> 44-46 ms/iter, 3 consistent pairs)

isomorphism.row_order: dense outer output IS bucket order (ascending key): per bucket, left-major cross products, then left-only rows in left order, then right-only rows in right order — the plan walk reproduces dense_int64_outer_positions exactly
isomorphism.key_lane: every row in bucket b has key min_key+b regardless of side, so the per-row Scalar coalesce is the closed form (min_key+b, bucket_rows) repeat runs — all-valid Int64, byte-identical to the eager coalesce
isomorphism.dtype_semantics: left lanes promote to nullable Float64 (v as f64; 0.0-datum gap == Null(NaN)) ONLY when right-only buckets exist, right lanes ONLY when left-only rows exist — matching reindex_outer_join_column's per-positions has_missing check; a side with no missing keeps all-valid Int64 (take_positions path)
isomorphism.routing: same dense-span gate (span <= 4*rows+1024, min/max over BOTH key sets); non-shared key names, non-i64 columns, empty sides, cross-product overflow all fall through to the unchanged position-vector path
isomorphism.sink_check: sink=29596800 identical before/after (9865600 rows x 3 iters)

campaign_status: join family on 100k/card512 shapes: inner 40ms (19.5M rows), left 28ms (9.8M), outer 44ms (9.87M) — all three dense i64 builders now probe->plan->fused-typed-lanes
